def positive_gpu_memory_not_cleared_between_experiments():
    rule_id = "gpu_memory_not_cleared_between_experiments"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "GPU-backed experiment flows show no visible memory or session cleanup between runs."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
